top_signals.title: Crop Markets Mixed on Shipping Worries, US-China Trade Concerns
top_signals.summary: Crop markets were mixed Friday amid lingering tensions in the Black Sea and Strait of Hormuz, as well as concerns over US trade ties with China.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Anglo Selects Penny’s Group as Preferred Bidder for De Beers
top_signals.summary: Anglo American Plc has selected a group led by De Beers’ former boss Gareth Penny as the preferred bidder for its sale of the world’s biggest diamond mining company, people with knowledge of the matter said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former chief lending officer of Heritage State Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former chief lending officer of Heritage State Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Guidance: Royal Mint Trading Fund: framework document
top_signals.summary: This document sets out the accountabilities and relationships between the Royal Mint Trading Fund, the Shareholder (HM Treasury) and the Shareholder Representative (UK Government Investments).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: US lawmakers urge Trump administration to ban Chinese memory chips - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: US lawmakers urge Trump administration to ban Chinese memory chips  Financial Times
